result.stdout:
TestPrune - Test impact analysis tool

Usage: test-prune [--repo <path>] <command>

Global options:
  --repo <path>         Use <path> as the repo root (default: auto-detect from cwd)
  --parallelism <n>     Max parallel project analyses (default: processor count)

Commands:
  index      Build the dependency graph from source
  run        Run affected tests based on changes
  status     Show what tests would run (dry-run)
  dead-code  Detect unreachable symbols from entry points
  help       Show this help message

dead-code options:
  --entry <pattern>   Add entry point pattern (repeatable)
                      Default: *.main, *.Program.*, *.Routes.*, *.Scheduler.*
  --include-tests     Include symbols from test files in dead code report
  --verbose           Show why each symbol is unreachable
